paper_title: BART: Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training for Natural Language Generation, Translation, and Comprehension

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a denoising autoencoder framework combining bidirectional encoder and autoregressive decoder, enabling flexible noising functions like text infilling and sentence permutation.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Combination of books and Wikipedia data
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive dialogue, question answering, summarization, machine translation, sequence classification, token classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: General-purpose sequence-to-sequence pre-training for natural language generation, translation, and comprehension
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Denoising autoencoding (text infilling, token masking, token deletion, sentence permutation, document rotation)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for sequence generation, translation, comprehension, and classification tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: BART: Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training for Natural Language Generation, Translation, and Comprehension

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of BART with 12 layers in both encoder and decoder, achieving state-of-the-art results across multiple tasks while maintaining flexibility in noising strategies.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Combination of books and Wikipedia data (large-scale)
raw_extraction.parameters: 12L/12L (12 encoder layers / 12 decoder layers), hidden size 1024
raw_extraction.application: Abstractive dialogue, question answering, summarization, machine translation, sequence classification, token classification
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable sequence-to-sequence pre-training for improved generalization across diverse NLP tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Denoising autoencoding (text infilling, token masking, token deletion, sentence permutation, document rotation)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning for sequence generation, translation, comprehension, and classification tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: BART: Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training for Natural Language Generation, Translation, and Comprehension

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces denoising sequence-to-sequence pre-training with a combination of text infilling and sentence permutation, enabling bidirectional context understanding while maintaining unidirectional generation capabilities.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 160GB corpus of news, books, stories, and web text (same as RoBERTa)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language generation, abstractive summarization, machine translation, question answering, dialogue response generation
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned in paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Unified pre-training framework for natural language generation, translation, and comprehension tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Permuted Language Modeling (PLM) combining text infilling and sentence permutation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning (cross-entropy loss with label smoothing) and sequence-to-sequence generation
raw_extraction.extension: Uses a combination of text infilling and sentence permutation objectives, unlike prior works that relied solely on masked language modeling or autoregressive objectives.
raw_extraction.paper_title: BART: Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training for Natural Language Generation, Translation, and Comprehension

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of BART Base with larger capacity, achieving superior performance on generation tasks while retaining competitive discriminative performance.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 160GB corpus of news, books, stories, and web text (same as RoBERTa)
raw_extraction.application: Natural language generation, abstractive summarization, machine translation, question answering, dialogue response generation
raw_extraction.license: Closed source (no explicit license mentioned in paper)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Unified pre-training framework for natural language generation, translation, and comprehension tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Permuted Language Modeling (PLM) combining text infilling and sentence permutation
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning (cross-entropy loss with label smoothing) and sequence-to-sequence generation
raw_extraction.paper_title: BART: Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training for Natural Language Generation, Translation, and Comprehension

raw_extraction.innovation: Scaled-up version of BART Base with more parameters, achieving improved performance through larger capacity and deeper architecture.
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: CCNet (Common Crawl), Wikipedia, WebText, StoryClusters, OpenWebText, BooksCorpus, PubMed Abstracts, arXiv
raw_extraction.application: Natural language generation, machine translation, text summarization, question answering
raw_extraction.research_problem: Unified pre-training framework for natural language generation, translation, and comprehension
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuned for natural language generation, translation, and comprehension tasks
raw_extraction.paper_title: BART: Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training for Natural Language Generation, Translation, and Comprehension
